title: Atos India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Atos India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Atos India Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Hyderabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Atos India Advisory Limited:
Atos India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atos India Advisory Limited!
